# anypoint_team_role (Data Source)

Reads a single `role` assignment on a `team` for your `org`.
		Matches on the tuple (role_id, context_params.org, context_params.envId).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anypoint_team_role" "org_admin" {
  org_id  = var.root_org
  team_id = "ID_OF_THE_TEAM"
  role_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"

  context_params = {
    org = "ID_OF_THE_TARGET_BG"
    # envId = "ID_OF_THE_ENV"   # for environment-scoped roles only
  }
}

output "team_role_name" {
  value = data.anypoint_team_role.org_admin.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `context_params` (Map of String) The role's scope (`org` and optional `envId`). Used to disambiguate role grants whose role_id alone is not unique.
- `org_id` (String) The master organization id where the team is defined.
- `role_id` (String) The role id to look up.
- `team_id` (String) The id of the team.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite id of the team role: {org_id}/{team_id}/{role_id}/{context_org}[/{env_id}].
- `name` (String) The role display name returned by the platform.
